# Links

Quick to access blogs, papers, articles, etc. Each with a description for searching

## Blogs

### General 

[Andrew Heiss](https://www.andrewheiss.com/blog/)

[Frank Harrell](https://www.fharrell.com)

[Aki Vehtari](https://users.aalto.fi/~ave/)

[Andrew Gelman](https://statmodeling.stat.columbia.edu)

[Michael Betancourt](https://betanalpha.github.io/writing/)

### Specific

[Simulate vs Predict in lme4](https://tmalsburg.github.io/predict-vs-simulate.html)

## Papers

### Copulas

[Everything You Always Wanted to Know about Copula
Modeling but Were Afraid to Ask](https://www.uni-muenster.de/Physik.TP/~lemm/seminarSS08/JHE-2007.pdf)

### Bayesian

#### Workflow

[Bayesian Workflow](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2011.01808)

## Articles

[The unreasonable effectiveness of just showing up everyday](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=27833064)
